change.item: Added Joomla update server metadata to the extension manifest.
Added Joomla changelog URL to the extension manifest and update stream.
Prepared official update stream metadata for GitHub Releases distribution.

fix.item: Changed the manifest name to a literal extension name so uninstall messages no longer show a raw language constant.

addition.item: Initial stable release of JT Position Finder.
Added an accessible module position finder to Joomla administrator module edit screens.
Added template-grouped position browsing with search, default template indicator, usage badges and custom position input.

change.item: Uses Joomla Web Asset Manager, Atum administrator template styling and Bootstrap 5 classes without a custom stylesheet.

note.item: Designed for Joomla 6 administrator module edit screens.
